description_long: This is a classical-style stone sculpture mounted on an ornate pedestal. The pedestal features elaborate scrollwork and decorative reliefs, with a square base that sits on a weathered stone slab. Atop the pedestal is a sculpted figure, possibly a cherub or mythological character, holding an object close to its chest. The surface of the sculpture is aged, with visible discoloration and patina, suggesting exposure to the elements. The overall form is vertical and slender, with intricate details on the pedestal and a more organic, rounded figure above. The base is surrounded by a rectangular patch of worn ground, indicating it is likely installed outdoors.
description: A classical stone sculpture of a figure atop an ornate pedestal, featuring scrollwork and weathered surfaces, set on a rectangular stone base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed scrollwork on the pedestal and the figure above, with the base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the layered structure of the pedestal and the rectangular base, with less detail on the figure.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the scrollwork from a different angle and the figure's profile, with the base extending forward.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the pedestal and figure, with the base and some ground texture visible.
attribute_location_context: outdoor paved or stone area, possibly a park or plaza
